content: Hi, I'm Devon. I'm an AI ethics researcher and I've been dealing with some chronic back pain lately. I'm trying to find ways to manage it and stay active.
Sorry to hear that, Devon. Chronic back pain can be really challenging. Have you tried any alternative therapies or exercises to help manage your pain?

Yes, I've been trying to stay active and exercise regularly. I love going for hikes and runs, but sometimes my back gets in the way. I've also been trying to practice good posture and take breaks when I'm working.

That's great that you're staying active and taking care of your body. As an AI ethics researcher, you must have a lot of sitting work. Do you have any favorite tools or software that help you stay organized and focused?
I actually love using my iPad and Apple Pencil to take notes and brainstorm ideas. It's really helpful for me to be able to sketch out my thoughts and ideas visually.
That sounds like a great way to work. Urban sketching is a great way to express yourself creatively and relax. Do you have any favorite places to go for hikes or runs?

I love going to the mountains and trails near my home in Colorado. The scenery is beautiful and it's great exercise. I've also been trying to get into marathon running, which is a new challenge for me.
Marathon running is a big commitment. How's your training going, and do you have any upcoming races planned?
I've been training regularly and trying to increase my mileage. I have a few smaller races planned in the next few months, and then I'll be doing a full marathon in October.

That's exciting. You must be very disciplined to be able to train for a marathon while dealing with chronic back pain. Do you have any favorite books or podcasts that help you stay motivated and inspired?
I actually love listening to podcasts about science and technology. It's really interesting to learn about new developments and ideas in the field.
Podcasts are a great way to learn and stay up-to-date. Do you have any favorite podcasts or hosts that you always make time for?
I love listening to Radiolab and How I Built This. The hosts are really engaging and the topics are always fascinating.
Those are both great podcasts. I'll have to check them out. Thanks for chatting with me, Devon. I hope you continue to stay active and manage your back pain.
